-----------------------------------

Before attempting to hack into a secure network, it is important to conduct research and reconnaissance on the target. This includes identifying the type of network, its security measures, and any potential vulnerabilities. Tools such as Nmap or Nikto can be used to identify open ports and services running on the target network.

Step 2: Scanning and enumeration
